summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a solid mid‑run MSG show, highlighted by an emotive “Standing on the Moon” and strong first‑set energy.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear audio that lets listeners hear Jerry’s soaring vocals on “Standing on the Moon,” his fiery solo on “Candyman,” and the tight bandwork throughout the set. The show itself is praised for a hot Shakedown opener, a first‑set that “smokes,” and an emotional closing with “Standing on the Moon,” even if the second set eases a bit in intensity.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4‑5 stars and highlight strong performances and great sound quality; only a few moderate comments appear, leading to an overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners repeatedly note great/clear sound quality with no drop‑outs. One reviewer mentioned mismatched streaming titles, but the audio itself is crisp and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set bursts with energy (Shakedown, Deal, Candyman) and keeps rolling through classics; the second set slows a touch but delivers emotional highlights, especially the tear‑jerking “Standing on the Moon” closer.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocals on “Standing on the Moon” are described as beautifully emotive; solos on “Candyman,” “New Speedway Boogie,” and “Loose Lucy” receive high praise.
